title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: April 13, 2023
summary: April 13 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice has had a fair bit of variability and has had a very small net increase , and since last week, by a rate of only 0.16% , from the level on 04/06/2023 of 14.053 M km 2 to 14.076 M km 2 for this week. title: It’s choice, not fate, on climate. Alaska News Brief April 2023.
summary: Too many pandemic lessons have gotten lost as the engine of “normal” revs back up.
